label: Leaking Pipe — Apartment
subject: Urgent: Water leak in apartment B1, Hämeentie 23
body:
Hello,

I am writing to report a water leak under the kitchen sink in my apartment.

Address: Hämeentie 23, Helsinki
Apartment: B1
Problem: There is a slow but constant drip coming from under the kitchen sink. The pipe connection seems to be loose. I've placed a bucket under it but it fills up every few hours.

The master key can be used to enter my apartment.
Please note: I have a cat, so please be careful when opening the door.

I am available Monday–Friday between 8:00 and 17:00.

Best regards,
Tapio Heikkinen
Phone: +358 45 111 2233

label: Broken Elevator — Common Area
subject: Elevator not working at Mannerheimintie 10
body:
Hi,

The elevator at Mannerheimintie 10, Helsinki has been out of service since this morning. It stops at the 3rd floor and the doors don't open.

This is a common area issue affecting all residents.

Please send someone to fix it as soon as possible.

Thanks,
Aleksi Virtanen
+358 40 123 4567

label: Heating Issue — Apartment
subject: No heating in apartment A3 at Fredrikinkatu 15
body:
Dear Property Maintenance,

The radiators in my apartment have been completely cold for the past two days.

Property: Fredrikinkatu 15, Helsinki
Apartment number: A3
Issue: All radiators are cold, no heating at all

Master key usage is permitted.
No special considerations.

Please arrange for a technician visit.

Regards,
Lauri Jokinen
Tel: +358 40 333 7766

label: Parking Lot Light — Common Area
subject: Broken light in parking area, Runeberginkatu 5
body:
Hello,

The outdoor light in the parking area at Runeberginkatu 5, Helsinki is broken. It has been dark for about a week now and it is becoming a safety hazard.

This is a common area issue.

The gate code is 3377#.

Best,
Päivi Karjalainen
Phone: +358 46 888 9900
